channel.title: Sales on The Beige Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Sales on The Beige Journal

item.title: Digital Planner Black Friday/Cyber Monday Sale 2022!
item.description:
The holiday season is around the corner and we’re excited for sales!

As a stationery lover, Etsy is always my favourite place to search for unique items. So, I always make sure to check Etsy during Black Friday and Cyber Monday sales for all holiday gifts (and something extra for me :) )

So while you’re searching for your next planner, don’t forget to check their Etsy Gift Guide for gifts for your close ones (or for yourself!)

See the Etsy Gift Guide

And the list you’ve been waiting for! Our Black Friday/Cyber Monday Sale list for 2022!

During this time, you’ll be able to save big on some of our most popular digital planners. So don’t wait, take advantage of this great opportunity and get yourself a digital planner today at some of these amazing shops!

item.title: 🎃 All you need for the Halloween crafting: 3 million fonts & graphics for only $1 🎃
item.description:
Gear up for the Halloween crafting spree! Get the All Access Subscription for just $1 for the first month (renews at $19/month) and access over 3 million high quality crafting assets, including:

  • Halloween graphics
  • Halloween fonts
  • Halloween crafts
  • And much more… 

BONUS: Everything come with a commercial license!

Only available from ​Sunday, 5 September until Sunday, 31 October, 2021!

[su_button url=“https://www.creativefabrica.com/promo/1779/0P14FGHIJKLMNO/ref/1362522/" target=“blank” style=“flat” background="#C9ADA7” size=“11” center=“yes”]See the full details![/su_button]

item.title: Etsy Digital Planner Shop Black Friday Deals 2020
item.description:
Black Friday is almost here again! Take a look at some shops that are offering sales with exclusive coupon codes!

For more planner sales, check our Current Sales section

20% off site wide (Etsy included) from Thanksgiving at 6pm through Monday the 30th (sale will end Monday, November 30 at 11:59pm EST)

Shop PerfectandPaperless

Use BLACKMONERIAS for 20% off between November 27 and 30 

Shop Monerias Journals 

Black Friday sale with 30% off + people on the VIP email list will get a code for an additional 30% off! 

Join the email list

Shop Softedesigns

35% off from Black Friday to Monday with code BLACK.

Shop Jaeci Studio

Black Friday and a Cyber Monday sale

use BFF50, for 50% all items in the shop.
